Localization.Description: The execution state of a virtual machine is reverted

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The execution state of virtual machine "{object.name}" is reverted to snapshot "{object.value}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Failed to revert the execution state of virtual machine "{object.name}" to snapshot "{object.value}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
